title: Low Fire
description: Lower your first-person fire to enhance visibility!
body:
![Comparison](https://imgur.com/FTD8uKA.png) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-pack) [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/low-fire-oculie) > #### Low Fire reduces the height of the fire in first-person, making sure it doesn't distract your view during gameplay while keeping the original block fire texture on the floor. - **Fire is 6 pixels lower than vanilla! That's 37.5% lower!** - **Fire is only lower in first-person and keeps the default block texture.**
### How it works 🧠 - The model file separates the entity fire and block fire, so you can change the entity fire without messing with the block fire. ##### This resource pack is always up to date and regularly tested to check for version compatibility, new file updates, and bugs. ### License **(ARR)** 📜
License - Feel free to use, modify, or share this project in any of your modpacks or resource packs as long as proper credit is given to me. - You may not sell or use this resource pack in any way that requires payment to access it. ##### For any other concerns, feel free to message me on discord **(@Oculie)**.
